programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: A New Hampshire town reels after police arrest four teenagers for robbing and murdering a 42-year-old mother and maiming her 11-year-old daughter; detectives uncover two suspects with the characteristics of sadistic psychopaths.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: Investigators search a farm for a missing man and find a human leg bone on the property; the owner, Susan Monica, admits that her pigs ate her tenant alive, and he's not the only victim; Monica despises humans but loves her pigs.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here
programs.sub_title: I Wanted My Father to Die
programs.desc: Teresa Holman spends much of her childhood wishing her father, Freddie Bowen, would die for the things he does to his family, but when presented with a chance to get her wish, the choice she makes has unforeseen consequences and leads to tragedy.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programs.desc: During the day, Lorenzo Gilyard is a soft-spoken and well-liked man, but at night, he's a monster, preying on women; his best friend, a trained social worker, misses the signs; going inside the prison to get answers from the notorious serial killer.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programs.desc: Michelle looks up to her father, but over time, fear and disgust replaces respect; as a teen, her world changes forever as horrific revelations buried for years finally emerge; Michelle's father must answer for his crimes.

programs.title: Homicide City
programs.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.
